overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in sci-fi armor exploring a gritty industrial underground facility. The character walks through communal areas, ascends metal staircases, traverses long corridors with exposed machinery, and observes a lower level from an overlook. The environment features warm artificial lighting, metal walkways, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial communal area with fire pit and seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the communal area toward the metal stairs in the background

notable_agents.action: seated at metal table on the right side
standing and conversing in the center area

entered.detail: burning metal barrel providing warm light and smoke
industrial metal table with items on surface
network of large pipes running along walls and ceiling
steep metal staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open industrial communal area with a burning fire barrel on the left and metal seating on the right. Several NPCs are present, some seated at tables and others standing. The character heads toward a metal staircase in the background, passing by various industrial pipes and machinery.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper industrial walkway with ventilation systems

events.description: ascends metal stairs and enters upper industrial corridor with large ventilation fans

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs and proceeding along the upper walkway

notable_agents.action: sitting on the ground near a soccer goal net

entered.detail: massive industrial ventilation fans mounted on the wall
safety railings along the edge of the walkway
large industrial electrical panels and conduits

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the metal stairs to an upper industrial walkway. The environment features large ventilation fans on the right wall, overhead pipes, and metal safety railings. A lone NPC sits near a soccer goal net in the distance. The communal area with the fire barrel is now behind.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long industrial corridor

entered.detail: green metal walls with rivets and industrial panels
large industrial equipment and generators behind railings
thick pipes and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, narrow industrial corridor with green metal walls and metal grating floor. Large machinery and electrical panels line the sides, while overhead pipes run along the ceiling. The corridor is empty of people and leads toward a distant doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance overlook with view to lower level

events.description: enters darker maintenance room with debris and industrial tanks
stops at railing to observe NPCs on lower level through steam

agents.ego_description: approaching the edge of the walkway and looking down at the lower level

notable_agents.action: standing on lower level visible through steam and fog

entered.detail: scattered trash and debris on the floor
large cylindrical storage tanks with pipes
metal safety railing at the edge of the overlook
lower industrial level visible through steam and haze

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker maintenance room with trash scattered on the floor and approaches a railing overlooking a lower level. Steam or fog partially obscures the view of NPCs standing on the level below. Large industrial tanks are visible to the left.

events.description: turns around and exits the maintenance overlook room
begins ascending second set of metal stairs

agents.ego_description: turning back from the overlook and ascending another staircase

notable_agents.action: seated in white chair near the wall

entered.detail: small seating area with white chairs and table
industrial ceiling lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the overlook and walks back through the maintenance area, passing a seating area with an NPC seated in a white chair. The character then approaches and begins ascending another set of metal stairs to a higher level.

agents.ego_description: walking along the final industrial corridor

entered.detail: industrial machinery and equipment behind metal railings
doorway at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the final stretch of industrial corridor, with machinery units visible behind railings on the right and electrical panels on the left. The corridor leads toward a distant doorway at the far end, with overhead lights illuminating the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling industrial communal hub that gradually transitions into a series of secluded, utilitarian maintenance corridors. It begins by weaving through a populated area with a burning fire barrel and metal seating before ascending a staircase past large ventilation fans to an upper walkway. As the character moves forward, the open space gives way to a long, narrow corridor with green metal walls and electrical panels, eventually leading into a dim maintenance room where steam partially obscures a view of a lower level. The scene then shifts back through the maintenance area, passing a lone figure in a white chair, before climbing another set of stairs. Finally, the camera proceeds along a final stretch of industrial corridor lined with machinery units, moving toward a distant doorway under the glow of overhead lights.
